# youtrack_issue_link_type (Resource)

YouTrack issue link type resource. This resource manages issue link types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_issue_link_type" "depends" {
  name             = "Depend"
  source_to_target = "is required for"
  target_to_source = "depends on"
  directed         = true
  aggregation      = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the issue link type.
- `source_to_target` (String) The outward name of the issue link type.
- `target_to_source` (String) The inward name of the issue link type.

### Optional

- `aggregation` (Boolean) Whether the issue link type represents an aggregation relation.
- `directed` (Boolean) Whether the issue link type is directed.
- `localized_name` (String) Localized name of the issue link type, if available.
- `localized_source_to_target` (String) Localized outward name of the issue link type, if available.
- `localized_target_to_source` (String) Localized inward name of the issue link type, if available.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the issue link type.
- `read_only` (Boolean) Whether the issue link type is read-only in YouTrack.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import youtrack_issue_link_type.depends <ISSUE_LINK_TYPE_ID>
```
